hyperedges.label: Tier 3.A settings cleanup and font-size flow
Golden Rules enforce anonymous full AI access
Ask AI modal vertical layout stack
Lesson content hierarchy: title → section → example → interactive questions

nodes.label: Hot Potato Platform
nodes.rationale: AI-powered learning platform for Thai students far from good schools; teachers author lessons with critical-thinking questions; students chat with a warm Gemini tutor.

nodes.label: Golden Rule 1 — Never Ration Tokens
nodes.rationale: No per-student quotas or paywall logic; rate limiting exists only to stop bots with generous env-tunable thresholds (AI_RATELIMIT_PER_10MIN=60, AI_RATELIMIT_PER_DAY=1000).

nodes.label: Golden Rule 2 — Anonymous Full Access
nodes.rationale: Logged-out users read public content and use AI fully; only difference is no persistence. Never add protect to AI or public-content read paths.

nodes.label: graphify-out Knowledge Graph
nodes.rationale: Prebuilt codebase graph (1231 nodes, 97 communities); query before blind grep; rebuild scheduled at launch tier.

nodes.label: Client/Server Two Halves
nodes.rationale: React 19+Vite client on Vercel; Express 5+Mongoose server on Render; communicate via REST with JWT axios bridge.

nodes.label: Separate Git Repositories
nodes.rationale: client/ and server/ are independent repos; no repo at Hot-Potato root; stray git init at C:/Users/BTCOM causes foreign files in status.

nodes.label: lessonContext.service.ts
nodes.rationale: Server serializes full TipTap lesson from MongoDB; cached by updatedAt; client no longer sends lesson text.

nodes.label: ChatSession Model
nodes.rationale: Per (user, content, block) conversation; cap 50 messages; logged-in history source; anonymous uses clientThread.

nodes.label: StudentMemory
nodes.rationale: Logged-in warm sketch injected into systemInstruction; async updates every N turns; GET/DELETE /api/chat/memory are only protected chat routes.

nodes.label: Arc1 AI Tutor Rework Roadmap
nodes.rationale: 2026-07-09 tutor-only plan: Phases -1 through 3 shipped; superseded by arc2 then v3 launch roadmap.

nodes.label: Arc2 Universal Roadmap
nodes.rationale: Tiers 0-3 shipped and owner-gated 2026-07-10; Tier 4 dopamine deferred; history only — do not execute.

nodes.label: Arc2 Tier 0 — Conversation Core
nodes.rationale: Fixes P1-P5: client rewire to /tutor, markdown pipeline, phone-first chat UI, context-flow pass; shipped 2026-07-10.

nodes.label: Arc2 Tier 1 — Tutor Experience
nodes.rationale: SSE streaming, teacher agent_settings, six student personalities; owner tone-gates passed per prompt-notes.

nodes.label: Arc2 Tier 2 — Product Completeness
nodes.rationale: Real Profile page, login UX cleanup, page polish sweep; all 15 pages real.

nodes.label: Arc2 Tier 3 — Hardening & Ops
nodes.rationale: CORS allowlist, users/status lockdown, auth rate limit, account status enforcement, model defaults gemini-3.5-flash.

nodes.label: Tier 0.A Client Rewire
nodes.rationale: Replace questionFeedbackApi with tutorApi; retire /ask /feedback /write-evaluate; intent-aware persona kills P1 greeting-as-answer bug.

nodes.label: Tier 1.A SSE Streaming
nodes.rationale: stream:true → text/event-stream with token/suggestions/done/error; createSuggestionsGate hides [SUGGESTIONS] from tokens; fetch not axios.

nodes.label: Content.agent_settings
nodes.rationale: Per-lesson teacher controls: persona_note, allow_direct_answers, scope, custom_guidelines; injected below Golden Rules in persona.

nodes.label: Student Tutor Personalities
nodes.rationale: Six presets in personality.ts; tutorPersonality.store; localStorage for anonymous; synced to StudentMemory.tutor_personality when logged in.

nodes.label: Phase -1 Test Harness
nodes.rationale: Vitest+supertest+mongodb-memory-server; app.ts/index.ts split; characterization tests before SDK migration; shipped 2026-07-10.

nodes.label: POST /api/chat/tutor (Arc1 Phase 1)
nodes.rationale: Introduced unified tutor with lessonContext, ChatSession, four modes; legacy endpoints kept until Phase 5 then deleted in arc2 Tier 0.

nodes.label: [SUGGESTIONS] Output Contract
nodes.rationale: persona.ts emits marker; parse.ts splits; client renders chips; format changes need both sides plus tests.

nodes.label: CORS_ORIGINS Allowlist
nodes.rationale: Env-driven origin allowlist; fails open with boot warning when unset so misconfigured Render does not brick students.

nodes.label: Playwright MCP Browser Automation
nodes.rationale: Cursor .cursor/mcp.json mirrors playwright for driving client at :5173; session restart required to load tools.

nodes.label: Tier 3 — Settings & Profile completeness
nodes.rationale: Launch-readiness v3 Tier 3: eliminate dead settings rows and expose tutor memory UI students have never seen.

nodes.label: Golden Rule 1 — Never ration tokens
nodes.rationale: Tier 3 must not add per-student quotas or paywall logic while implementing settings/profile.

nodes.label: Golden Rule 2 — Anonymous full access on /settings
nodes.rationale: /settings stays public with zero dead rows for logged-out users; theme, language, font size, personality, and Help & Support all work anonymously.
nodes.norm_label: golden rule 2 — anonymous full access on /settings

nodes.label: Client-only scope fence
nodes.rationale: All Tier 3 work happens in client/ with zero server changes; GET/DELETE /api/chat/memory already exist since Phase 3.

nodes.label: Owner decision D3 — No PDPA page; delete account deferred
nodes.rationale: Delete account row is cut from settings, not wired; returns in Tier 6.A.

nodes.label: Owner decision D4 — Settings keeps only working rows
nodes.rationale: Build app-wide font size; Help & Support becomes Facebook contact popup; dead rows cut.
nodes.norm_label: owner decision d4 — settings keeps only working rows

nodes.label: appearance.store — app-wide font size
nodes.rationale: Four-step persisted control (small/normal/large/xlarge) applies % to document.documentElement.style.fontSize at module load; separate from viewer CSS zoom.

nodes.label: tutorMemory.store — normalize StudentMemory for UI
nodes.rationale: Fetches GET /chat/memory and DELETE /chat/memory; strips internal fields (_id, user_id, tutor_personality, timestamps) before rendering.

nodes.label: TutorMemoryCard component
nodes.rationale: Logged-in students view interests/strengths/growth_areas/preferences/recent_topics chips and clear memory with AlertDialog confirm; growth_areas labeled Growing in never weaknesses.

nodes.label: /profile RequireLogin + tutor section
nodes.rationale: Remove duplicate Theme row; add personality shortcut linking to /settings and TutorMemoryCard.

nodes.label: Tier 3 shipped — 113 client tests
nodes.rationale: 3.A + 3.B complete: 98 tests after 3.A, 113 after 3.B; optional learning-stats row skipped.

nodes.norm_label: access visibility controls (สาธารณะ/เฉพาะลิงก์/สวนตัว)

nodes.label: Golden Rule 1 — Never Ration Tokens
nodes.rationale: No per-student quotas, message caps, or paywall logic. Rate limiting exists only to stop bots with env-tunable generous thresholds (AI_RATELIMIT_PER_10MIN=60, AI_RATELIMIT_PER_DAY=1000). Overrides best-practice instincts.

nodes.label: Golden Rule 2 — Anonymous Full Access
nodes.rationale: No-login users read all public content and use AI fully. Only difference: no persistence. Never add protect to AI or public-content read paths. Logged-in-only features degrade gracefully, never to login wall.

nodes.label: Product Principles (Owner)
nodes.rationale: Thai-first AI; critical thinking over correctness; students are low-tech AI newbies; teacher context drives agent; phone-first (~390px); solo free-tier project (Vercel+Render+Atlas).

nodes.label: Owner Decision D1 — Deploy Last
nodes.rationale: No pushes until Tier 5; all deploy overhead (push, Render env, admin promote, prod smoke) happens together in one shot.

nodes.label: Owner Decision D8 — Teacher AI Helper
nodes.rationale: Tier 3.5 ships before launch. Create page gets AI copilot for low-tech teachers. Formula AI uses existing KaTeX latex attr; preview→accept never auto-apply; creator routes are teacher-only (protect).
nodes.norm_label: owner decision d8 — teacher ai helper

nodes.label: Phase 0.A — Static Meta + OG Tags
nodes.rationale: Shipped 2026-07-10. Site-wide OG/Twitter tags in index.html; robots.txt; favicon fix. Per-lesson OG deferred (SPA limitation, Tier 6.D).

nodes.label: Phase 1.A — Error Ring Buffer + AI Health
nodes.rationale: In-memory last ~50 errors; AI health from generateWithRetry outcomes. Extended GET /api/status/all. No Gemini ping from status endpoint (Golden Rule 1).
nodes.norm_label: phase 1.a — error ring buffer + ai health

nodes.label: Phase 2.A — Route-Level Code Splitting
nodes.rationale: React.lazy + Suspense in App.tsx; manualChunks for tiptap/fabric/katex. Entry chunk reduced from 648 kB to 137 kB gzip.

nodes.label: Phase 3.A — Settings Cleanup + Appearance
nodes.rationale: Cut dead rows; Help & Support popup with Facebook contact; app-wide font-size via appearance.store (separate from viewer CSS zoom).

nodes.label: Tier 3.5 — Teacher AI Helper
nodes.rationale: Shipped 2026-07-11. AI copilot in /canvas/:id editor for low-tech teachers. Full spec in plan/tier3.5.md.

nodes.label: Phase 3.5.G — AI Hub UX Rework
nodes.rationale: Left sidebar AI hub (5th category); caretInsertPoint for outline; styleHint on fill; writing assistant discoverable without selection.

nodes.label: Tier 5 — Launch Day Deploy
nodes.rationale: Requires Tiers 0–3.5 done. Push both repos, configure Render/Vercel env, admin promote, prod smoke logged-in and incognito.

nodes.label: Phase 6.D — Per-Lesson OG Previews
nodes.rationale: Requires SSR/prerender/edge function for /view/:id links. Parked from Tier 0 SPA limitation.

nodes.label: Preview → Accept Rule
nodes.rationale: AI output enters document only through normal editor transaction after teacher accepts. Autosave and optimistic-concurrency machinery untouched.

nodes.label: Careful-Not-To-Break: Anonymous Full Access
nodes.rationale: optionalAuth on content + chat routes. Adding protect to AI/public-read path is a regression.

nodes.label: POST /api/chat/tutor
nodes.rationale: Unified tutor agent — 4 modes, optionalAuth + rate limit, SSE streaming. Only student AI endpoint. Legacy /ask|feedback|write-evaluate deleted Tier 0.

nodes.label: POST /api/creator/assist
nodes.rationale: Teacher AI copilot — 11 actions, protect + rate limit + owner/collaborator check. JSON mode + tolerant parse with one retry.

nodes.label: lessonContext.service.ts
nodes.rationale: Loads and serializes lesson from tiptap_json; cached by updatedAt. Server owns lesson context for AI.

nodes.label: services/tutor/persona.ts
nodes.rationale: buildSystemInstruction — tone-gated tutor persona. Changes must be logged in prompt-notes.md.

nodes.label: services/creator/prompts.ts
nodes.rationale: build<Action>Prompt per creator action. Separate from tutor persona; warm no-shame spirit.

nodes.label: services/tutor/genaiClient.ts
nodes.rationale: callTutorModel + callTutorModelStream. Reused by creator with optional responseMimeType for JSON mode.

nodes.label: auth.middleware.ts
nodes.rationale: protect / optionalAuth / restrictTo. Structured 401 body { forceRelogin, clearToken } consumed by client axios interceptor.

nodes.label: Content Model
nodes.rationale: Lesson document with tiptap_json, agent_settings (persona_note, allow_direct_answers, scope, custom_guidelines).

nodes.label: Tutor Modes (4)
nodes.rationale: free_chat | question_feedback | write_evaluation | followup. Intent rule gates evaluation on feedback tag only.

nodes.label: Tier 3.5 Golden Rules Scope
nodes.rationale: Golden Rules govern student side only. Creator routes are protect; never add protect to /api/chat/tutor or content read paths.

nodes.label: Tier Decision T2 — Preview Accept
nodes.rationale: Every AI result shown first; enters doc only via editor transaction on explicit accept. Reject = byte-identical doc.

nodes.label: Tier Decision T3 — No Raw TipTap JSON
nodes.rationale: Prose = markdown. Blocks = typed JSON matching node attrs, validated server-side. Client converts to nodes.
nodes.norm_label: tier decision t3 — no raw tiptap json

nodes.label: Creator 11 Actions
nodes.rationale: formula_latex, proofread, generate_questions, guide_answer, distractors, outline, draft_section, import_structure, critic, lesson_meta, agent_settings_suggest.

nodes.label: Action critic
nodes.rationale: Informational only — never blocks publish. Warm strengths-first report, no scores.

nodes.label: Action agent_settings_suggest
nodes.rationale: AI configures the AI tutor — suggests persona_note, custom_guidelines, scope, allow_direct_answers for publish modal.

nodes.label: FormulaBlock latex attr
nodes.rationale: LaTeX-first via persistLatex path. Legacy formula tree is fallback for old lessons only.

nodes.label: caretInsertPoint
nodes.rationale: Outline inserts at teacher caret, not doc top. Empty doc → top; empty line → replace; else below caret block.

nodes.label: Intent Rule — Evaluation Gating
nodes.rationale: Evaluation gated on exact [งานของเธอตอนนี้: ให้ฟีดแบ็กคำตอบของเพื่อน] tag. Greetings and small talk never graded.

nodes.label: FORMAT (STRICT) Markdown Rule
nodes.rationale: Light markdown allowed; labeled sections/headings forbidden. stripReportLabels guard in parse.ts removes leaked report labels.

nodes.label: gemini-3.5-flash Default
nodes.rationale: AI_TUTOR_MODEL default after model check. AI_FAST_MODEL stays gemini-2.5-flash-lite. Owner tone-gate passed.

nodes.label: Tier 3.5.A Creator Prompts
nodes.rationale: New prompt family in services/creator/prompts.ts. Separate from tone-gated tutor persona. JSON mode + schema footer.

nodes.label: Owner Sign-Off Tiers 0–3
nodes.rationale: All pending tone/behavior gates PASSED. Product core owner-approved 2026-07-10.

nodes.label: TipTap Node Single Source of Truth
nodes.norm_label: tiptap node single source of truth
